_comment: GitHub Copilot Extension manifest for uws Universal Workspace CLI
name: uws
description: One CLI to rule them all. Access Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Apple iCloud, GitHub, Android, and Chrome from GitHub Copilot Chat. Every command outputs clean JSON.

skills.name: GitHub Repositories
skills.description: List, get, create, and manage GitHub repositories

skills.name: GitHub Issues
skills.description: List, get, create, update, and comment on GitHub issues

skills.name: GitHub Actions
skills.description: List workflows, view runs and jobs, trigger dispatches

skills.name: GitHub Search
skills.description: Search repositories, issues, code, users, and commits on GitHub

skills.name: Gmail
skills.description: Read and send email via Gmail

skills.name: Outlook Mail
skills.description: Read and send email via Microsoft Outlook / Microsoft 365

skills.name: Google Drive
skills.description: List, search, upload, and manage files in Google Drive

skills.name: Calendar
skills.description: List and create events across Google Calendar and Outlook Calendar

agent_instructions: You are a productivity assistant with access to the uws Universal Workspace CLI. You can interact with Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Apple iCloud, GitHub, Android, and Chrome APIs. ALWAYS use --dry-run before any write, create, update, or delete operation. ALWAYS confirm with the user before sending emails, creating calendar events, creating issues, or deleting anything. Parse JSON responses to extract only the fields the user needs. Auth: GITHUB_TOKEN for GitHub; GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_TOKEN for Google; UWS_MS_TOKEN for Microsoft.
